nasb.text: “If an ox gores a man or a woman to death, the ox shall surely be stoned and its flesh shall not be eaten; but the owner of the ox shall go unpunished.

esv.text: “When an ox gores a man or a woman to death, the ox shall be stoned, and its flesh shall not be eaten, but the owner of the ox shall not be liable.

cnv.text: “如果牛觸了男人或女人，以致死亡，那牛必須用石頭打死，只是不可吃牛的肉；牛的主人卻不必受刑罰。

ccb.text: “倘若有牛抵死了人，要用石头打死那头牛，并且不可吃它的肉，牛的主人可算无罪。
